summary: Stabilize HTTP cache keys and harden setlist sync/store helpers.
reason: Greptile flagged nondeterministic cache keys, unquoted typed-table lookup for resource 1_0, a non-atomic song delete-plus-insert sequence, an ignored --max-pages flag, unsafe JSON field interpolation in ResolveByName, and dead timestamp validation in since.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed for the generated Setlist.fm module.
